flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Pamlico Community College are 11% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($30.0k vs $33.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pamlico Community College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (198 → 165).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pamlico Community College rose 57% between 2006 and 2009 (50.0% → 78.7%).
